$resultId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['name','course','score','total','percentage','finishedAt','details']) && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length <= 80 && newData.child('course').isString() && newData.child('course').val().length <= 40 && newData.child('score').isNumber() && newData.child('score').val() >= 0 && newData.child('score').val() <= 20 && newData.child('total').val() == 20 && newData.child('percentage').isNumber() && newData.child('percentage').val() >= 0 && newData.child('percentage').val() <= 100
